exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves high-altitude physical labor, manual repairs of composite materials, and complex mechanical troubleshooting in unpredictable outdoor environments, which are highly resistant to AI automation. While AI and drones are increasingly used for remote monitoring and visual inspection, the physical intervention and specialized rope-work required for maintenance remain human-centric. Japan's labor shortage in this sector will likely lead to AI being used as a supportive tool for efficiency rather than a replacement for technicians.

title: AIエンジニア
exposure_rationale: AI Engineers are at the epicenter of the technology, with their core tasks—coding, data analysis, and research—being highly susceptible to AI-driven automation (e.g., GitHub Copilot, automated ML). While they are the creators of these systems, the profession is undergoing a massive shift where AI tools now handle routine implementation, moving the human role toward high-level architecture and 'prompt engineering' within a fully digital workflow.

title: CG制作
exposure_rationale: CG production is a purely digital field where Generative AI is already capable of automating core tasks like 2D asset creation, texture generation, and even complex 3D modeling and animation. While high-level creative direction and complex scene composition still require human oversight, the productivity gains from AI are drastically reducing the labor hours required for routine production steps.

title: DXプロデューサー
exposure_rationale: As a role centered on digital transformation, DX Producers heavily utilize AI for data analysis, solution architecting, and content generation, significantly increasing their individual productivity. While the core of the job involves high-level human judgment, stakeholder negotiation, and creative visioning that AI cannot yet replace, the 'digital-first' nature of their work product makes them highly exposed to AI-driven workflow restructuring.

title: ITコンサルタント
exposure_rationale: IT consulting is a high-level knowledge profession where core tasks—data analysis, strategy formulation, and technical documentation—are being radically accelerated by generative AI. While the role requires human-centric skills like stakeholder management and high-level judgment, the 'digital' nature of the work product and the shift toward AI-driven DX solutions mean the profession will undergo significant restructuring and productivity gains.

title: M&Aマネージャー、M&Aコンサルタント/M&Aアドバイザー
exposure_rationale: M&A work is highly digital and information-intensive, involving extensive data analysis, due diligence, and document preparation (LOIs, contracts, valuation reports) where AI can provide massive productivity gains. However, the core of the role relies on high-stakes human negotiation, complex stakeholder management, and professional judgment in unpredictable business environments, which prevents full automation.

title: UX/UIデザイナー
exposure_rationale: UX/UI design is a digital-first occupation where AI tools can now generate wireframes, layouts, and even functional code from text prompts or sketches. While high-level user research and stakeholder management require human empathy and negotiation, the core production tasks—visual design, prototyping, and usability testing—are being rapidly automated or augmented by AI, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total labor hours required per project.

title: Webディレクター（Web制作会社）
exposure_rationale: The core output of this role is digital, and AI is rapidly automating the primary tasks of the staff being directed, such as coding, graphic design, and copywriting. While human-centric project management and client negotiation remain critical, AI tools for wireframing, scheduling, and quality assurance significantly increase individual productivity, likely leading to team consolidation and a higher technical bar for the role.

title: Webデザイナー（Web制作会社）
exposure_rationale: Web design is a fundamentally digital occupation where core tasks—layout creation, image editing, and coding (HTML/CSS)—are being rapidly automated by generative AI and no-code tools. While high-level creative direction and client management remain human-centric, the technical production work that defines the bulk of the role in Japanese production companies is highly susceptible to AI-driven restructuring.

title: あんまマッサージ指圧師
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is a physical, hands-on medical service that requires tactile sensitivity and real-time adjustment to a patient's physical condition. While AI might assist with administrative tasks, scheduling, or diagnostic suggestions, the physical execution of massage and shiatsu remains highly resistant to automation due to the complexity of human touch and the regulatory requirement for a national license.

title: はり師・きゅう師
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is a physical, hands-on medical procedure requiring precise manual dexterity and real-time tactile feedback to locate acupoints. While AI can assist in diagnosis, treatment planning, and business management, the physical act of needle insertion and moxibustion remains a human-centric task with significant regulatory and cultural barriers to automation.

title: アウトドアインストラクター
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical activity in unpredictable natural environments and real-time human interaction, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI can assist with administrative tasks, route planning, or environmental data analysis, the primary value lies in physical safety management, hands-on instruction, and human hospitality.

title: アナウンサー
exposure_rationale: AI voice synthesis and digital avatars can already perform routine news reading and narration with high accuracy, significantly impacting entry-level tasks. While high-stakes live sports commentary and complex interpersonal interviewing remain difficult to automate, the core information-delivery aspect of the job is highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains and substitution.

title: アートディレクター
exposure_rationale: The core work product is digital, and generative AI is already revolutionizing visual asset creation, layout design, and concept ideation. While the role requires high-level human judgment, client management, and creative direction, AI significantly reduces the time needed for execution and allows a single director to oversee more projects with fewer subordinate designers.

title: イラストレーター
exposure_rationale: The work product is entirely digital and generative AI has reached a level where it can produce high-quality illustrations, character designs, and backgrounds in seconds. While top-tier creative direction and unique brand consistency still require humans, the vast majority of routine commercial illustration, gaming assets, and advertising visuals are being fundamentally restructured by AI tools.

title: インダストリアルデザイナー
exposure_rationale: Industrial design is a digital-heavy knowledge profession where AI can now rapidly generate 2D sketches, 3D models, and color variations based on specific parameters. While human judgment is still required for physical prototyping and cross-departmental coordination, AI significantly automates the core creative ideation and technical drafting phases, drastically increasing individual productivity.

title: インテリアコーディネーター
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of visual design, 3D modeling, and material selection are highly susceptible to Generative AI, which can instantly produce high-quality interior renderings based on client prompts. While the role requires physical site visits and high-level interpersonal consulting to manage client emotions and contractor logistics, the digital workflow for presentation and planning is undergoing significant AI-driven restructuring.

title: インテリアデザイナー
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of interior design—generating layouts, selecting color palettes, and creating 3D visualizations—are increasingly being automated or enhanced by generative AI and CAD integration. While the role still requires physical site visits and human-centric empathy for client needs, the digital nature of the design output makes it highly susceptible to significant productivity shifts and task restructuring.

title: エコノミスト
exposure_rationale: Economists perform high-level knowledge work that is almost entirely digital, involving data analysis, trend forecasting, and report writing—all areas where LLMs and AI-driven statistical tools excel. While top-tier strategic synthesis and policy advocacy still require human judgment, AI can now automate the vast majority of data collection, econometric modeling, and initial drafting, significantly reducing the number of workers needed for these tasks.

title: オーケストラ奏者（団員）
exposure_rationale: The core of the job is a live, physical performance in a specific acoustic environment, which AI cannot replicate in a concert hall setting. While AI can assist in score analysis, composition, or digital recording, the cultural value of an orchestra lies in human synchronization, physical mastery, and the real-time emotional connection between performers and a live audience.

title: カウンセラー（医療福祉分野）
exposure_rationale: While AI is highly effective at digital communication, sentiment analysis, and providing therapeutic chat, the core of this role relies on 'rapport' and legal/ethical accountability in sensitive medical and child welfare contexts. AI will significantly automate documentation, initial screenings, and monitoring, but Japan's regulatory framework and the high value placed on human-to-human empathy in clinical psychology provide a buffer against full replacement.

title: カラーコーディネーター
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of color coordination—analyzing trends, mapping color palettes to brand concepts, and generating visual simulations—are highly digital and align perfectly with Generative AI capabilities. While high-end architectural or personal consulting still requires human empathy and physical context, the majority of commercial color design and marketing analysis can now be automated or significantly accelerated by AI tools.

title: キャリアカウンセラー/キャリアコンサルタント
グラフィックデザイナー
exposure_rationale: Graphic design is a digital-first occupation where Generative AI can now perform core tasks like image creation, layout generation, and color theory application with high proficiency. While high-level art direction and client management still require human judgment, the productivity gains from AI mean significantly fewer designers are needed to produce the same volume of work, leading to major structural changes in the industry.

title: ゲームクリエーター
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of game creation—coding, graphic design, sound production, and scenario writing—are all digital-first domains where Generative AI is already demonstrating high proficiency. While high-level creative direction and project management remain human-led, AI tools are drastically reducing the labor required for asset generation and routine programming, leading to significant structural changes in the industry.

title: コピーライター
exposure_rationale: Copywriting is a purely digital information-processing task where AI models already excel at generating creative catchphrases, structured text, and marketing angles based on data. While high-level creative direction and final client management still require human judgment, the core production of drafts and the synthesis of market trends are being rapidly automated by generative AI.

title: システムエンジニア（Webサービス開発）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a Web System Engineer—coding, designing architecture, writing documentation, and testing—are fundamentally digital and align perfectly with the capabilities of Large Language Models and AI coding assistants. While human oversight is still required for complex requirement definition and team coordination, AI can now automate significant portions of the development lifecycle, drastically increasing individual productivity and reducing the total number of workers needed for standard web projects.

title: システムエンジニア（受託開発）
exposure_rationale: The core work products—code, design documents, and test plans—are entirely digital and highly susceptible to AI generation and automation. While high-level requirements gathering and client communication provide a buffer, AI significantly accelerates technical tasks, allowing fewer engineers to handle larger projects and fundamentally restructuring the development lifecycle.

title: システムエンジニア（基盤システム）
exposure_rationale: Infrastructure engineering is increasingly shifting from physical hardware manipulation to 'Infrastructure as Code' (IaC) and cloud-based configurations, which are highly susceptible to AI automation. AI can now generate complex configuration scripts, optimize network architectures, and perform automated troubleshooting, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the need for manual intervention in routine setup and monitoring.

title: システムエンジニア（組込み、IoT）
exposure_rationale: While core software development and system design are highly susceptible to AI-driven coding assistants and automated testing, this role requires integration with physical hardware, sensors, and real-world environments. The need to troubleshoot physical components and coordinate with mechanical engineers in Japan's manufacturing sector provides a buffer against total automation compared to pure web/software developers.

title: ジュエリーデザイナー
exposure_rationale: Jewelry design is increasingly digital, relying heavily on CAD software and visual conceptualization, areas where generative AI can now produce high-quality 3D models and intricate patterns instantly. While high-end bespoke work still requires human brand identity and material expertise, the core tasks of trend analysis, sketching, and technical drafting are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and productivity shifts.

title: スクールカウンセラー
exposure_rationale: While AI can assist with report writing, analyzing behavioral patterns, and providing preliminary mental health screenings, the core of the job relies on high-stakes human-to-human empathy, trust-building, and physical presence in schools. In Japan, the cultural emphasis on 'face-to-face' counseling and the legal/ethical complexities of handling sensitive data regarding minors create significant barriers to full AI replacement.

title: スタイリスト
exposure_rationale: While AI can assist with trend analysis, mood board creation, and virtual outfit simulations, the core of the job involves significant physical labor, such as transporting heavy garments, on-site adjustments under studio lighting, and manual tasks like steaming or sewing. Furthermore, the role requires high-level interpersonal negotiation with apparel brands and real-time collaboration with directors and photographers in unpredictable physical environments.

title: スポーツインストラクター
exposure_rationale: While AI can generate personalized workout plans and analyze form via computer vision, the core of the job requires physical presence, hands-on safety supervision, and high-touch interpersonal motivation. In Japan's aging society, the role often involves social interaction and physical assistance for elderly clients, which are difficult to automate.

title: セキュリティエキスパート（オペレーション）
exposure_rationale: This occupation is fundamentally digital, involving the continuous monitoring and analysis of system logs and network traffic. AI is already being integrated into SOC operations to automate threat detection and log analysis, significantly increasing the productivity of human experts and shifting their role toward high-level incident response and complex decision-making.

title: セキュリティエキスパート（デジタルフォレンジック）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of digital forensics—data extraction, log analysis, pattern recognition, and malware investigation—are highly digital and increasingly automated by AI-driven security tools. While human experts are still required for legal testimony, chain-of-custody physical handling, and high-level ethical judgment, AI significantly accelerates the processing of massive datasets and the identification of anomalies that previously required manual review.

title: セキュリティエキスパート（情報セキュリティ監査）

title: 放送記者
exposure_rationale: Broadcast journalism involves significant digital knowledge work, including news drafting, video editing, and information synthesis, all of which are highly susceptible to AI productivity gains. While physical presence for on-site reporting and human-to-human interviewing provide a buffer, AI can now automate routine scriptwriting, translation, and initial footage sorting, significantly reducing the labor hours required per story.

title: 整形外科医
exposure_rationale: Orthopedic surgery involves a high degree of physical intervention, manual dexterity, and real-time tactile feedback during surgery and physical examinations. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy through image analysis (X-rays, MRI) and assist in surgical planning or robotic-assisted procedures, the core physical tasks and complex human-to-human coordination in rehabilitation and emergency care remain difficult to automate.

title: 新聞記者
exposure_rationale: The core output of a journalist—writing, summarizing, and structuring information—is highly susceptible to AI automation, particularly for routine reporting and digital editions. While physical presence for interviews and investigative 'footwork' remains a human necessity, AI significantly reduces the time needed for drafting, fact-checking, and data analysis, leading to higher productivity and potential workforce consolidation.

title: 日本語教師
exposure_rationale: Core tasks like lesson planning, material creation, and automated grading/feedback are highly susceptible to AI, which can now generate natural language and explain grammar nuances effectively. While the interpersonal aspect of cultural integration and student counseling remains important, AI's ability to provide personalized, 24/7 language practice significantly shifts the teacher's role toward facilitation and management rather than direct instruction.

title: 映像編集者
exposure_rationale: Video editing is a fundamentally digital occupation where AI is rapidly automating core tasks such as color grading, rough cuts, and object removal. While high-level creative direction and storytelling remain human-centric, the technical labor required to produce professional video is being drastically reduced by generative AI and automated editing tools.

title: 林業技術者
exposure_rationale: While the core work involves physical field surveys and on-site supervision in unpredictable natural environments, AI and drones are significantly automating data collection, forest inventory analysis, and mapping. However, the need for human judgment in ecological management and face-to-face coordination with local stakeholders and workers maintains a strong requirement for human presence.

title: 柔道整復師
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical manipulation (manual therapy), palpation, and applying bandages or casts, which require tactile sensitivity and real-time physical interaction that AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist in diagnostic support, insurance billing (recept-computer), and patient management, the primary service remains a hands-on physical treatment in an unpredictable human environment.

title: 栄養士
exposure_rationale: Core digital tasks like meal planning, nutritional calculation, and inventory management are highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization. However, the role remains significant in Japan's healthcare and education sectors, requiring physical presence for kitchen supervision, sensory food evaluation, and empathetic face-to-face nutritional counseling for an aging population.

title: 植物工場の研究開発
exposure_rationale: This role involves high-level knowledge work such as data analysis of environmental variables, genetic research, and system optimization, all of which are highly susceptible to AI-driven acceleration. While physical 'hands-on' verification in the factory remains necessary, AI is increasingly taking over the core tasks of predictive modeling for crop growth and the automated monitoring of cultivation environments.

title: 植物工場の設計、施工
exposure_rationale: The design phase is highly digital and susceptible to AI-driven CAD optimization, environmental simulation, and cost-efficiency modeling. However, the role also involves physical construction management, site inspection, and hands-on coordination with contractors, which provides a buffer against full automation.

title: 検察事務官
exposure_rationale: The role involves extensive documentation, evidence analysis, and administrative processing (事務手続) which are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and productivity gains. While tasks like victim support and interrogation attendance require human presence and empathy, the core functions of record-keeping, case management, and digital forensics are increasingly being reshaped by AI tools.

title: 検察官
exposure_rationale: Prosecutors deal with massive volumes of digital evidence and legal documentation where AI can significantly accelerate evidence analysis, case law research, and document drafting. However, the core responsibilities—interrogating suspects, making high-stakes discretionary decisions on whether to indict, and performing in-person courtroom advocacy—require human judgment and social intuition that are resistant to full automation.

title: 検疫官（看護師）
exposure_rationale: The role combines physical tasks like visual inspections, vaccinations, and pest collection with significant administrative and information-processing duties. While AI can automate document screening, translation, and real-time infection data analysis, the core requirement for physical presence in ports and human-to-human clinical judgment limits full automation.

title: 機械設計技術者
exposure_rationale: Mechanical design is heavily digital, relying on CAD, simulation, and analysis tools where AI is rapidly automating generative design and error-checking. While physical prototyping and cross-functional communication remain essential, AI significantly reduces the time required for technical drafting and feasibility simulations, increasing individual productivity and shifting the role toward high-level oversight.

title: 歯科助手
exposure_rationale: The administrative side of the role (reception, billing, and scheduling) is highly susceptible to AI automation and self-service systems. However, the core clinical support tasks—such as preparing physical instruments, sanitizing equipment, and providing physical assistance to patients—require manual dexterity and a physical presence that AI cannot currently replace.

title: 歯科医師
exposure_rationale: Dentistry requires high-precision manual dexterity and physical intervention in a complex, unpredictable biological environment, which remains difficult to automate. However, AI is significantly impacting the profession through advanced diagnostic imaging (AI-driven X-ray/CT analysis), treatment planning for orthodontics, and administrative tasks, making it a mix of physical skill and AI-assisted knowledge work.

title: 歯科技工士
exposure_rationale: The profession is undergoing a massive digital transformation as traditional manual molding is replaced by CAD/CAM systems and 3D printing. While the final product is physical, the core work of designing prosthetics is increasingly digital, allowing AI to automate complex design tasks and optimize structural integrity based on 3D scans.

title: 歯科衛生士
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a dental hygienist involve delicate manual procedures in the human mouth and real-time interpersonal care, which are highly resistant to AI automation. While AI will assist with diagnostic imaging, patient scheduling, and record-keeping, the physical nature of preventive treatment and the need for human empathy in patient education limit its overall exposure.

title: 気象予報士
exposure_rationale: The core task of analyzing meteorological data and numerical models is highly digital and increasingly dominated by AI and machine learning, which can process vast datasets more accurately than humans. While legal requirements in Japan mandate a certified weather forecaster for certain services and human 'weather casters' remain popular for communication, the technical analytical work is undergoing massive restructuring due to AI-driven predictive capabilities.

title: 水産技術者
exposure_rationale: This role involves a significant amount of data analysis, environmental modeling, and research documentation which are highly susceptible to AI optimization. However, the core of the job requires physical field surveys, biological specimen handling, and direct technical guidance to fishermen, creating a natural barrier to full automation.

title: 治験コーディネーター
exposure_rationale: The role involves heavy administrative and data-oriented tasks, such as creating case reports and scheduling, which are highly susceptible to AI automation and streamlining. However, the core requirement for empathetic patient communication, ethical oversight, and complex physical coordination between medical staff and pharmaceutical companies provides a significant buffer against full replacement.

title: 法務技官（心理）（矯正心理専門職）
exposure_rationale: The role involves significant digital-friendly tasks such as psychological assessment, report writing (鑑別結果通知書), and data analysis, which are highly susceptible to AI assistance. However, the core functions require high-stakes human interaction, clinical empathy, and physical presence within correctional facilities, creating a strong barrier to full automation in the Japanese legal and penal system.

title: 法務教官
exposure_rationale: The core of the role involves high-stakes human interaction, behavioral observation, and 24-hour physical supervision within correctional facilities, which are difficult to automate. While AI can significantly assist in analyzing psychological data, drafting rehabilitation reports, and providing educational content, the legal and ethical requirements for human judgment in juvenile reform remain a major barrier to high exposure.

title: 測量士
exposure_rationale: Surveying is seeing a significant shift as AI-driven drones, satellite data, and automated CAD software handle complex calculations and spatial mapping. While the job requires physical presence at construction sites and manual equipment setup, the core value is shifting from manual measurement to managing high-tech data streams and ensuring regulatory compliance in Japan's aging construction sector.

title: 特別支援学校教員、特別支援学級教員
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist with administrative tasks, drafting individualized education plans (IEPs), and creating customized digital learning materials, the core of the job involves high-intensity physical care and complex emotional support. The high degree of unpredictability in students' physical and behavioral needs, combined with the necessity for real-time human intervention and specialized medical/sensory care, creates a strong barrier to full AI replacement.

title: 特許審査官
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a patent examiner—searching global databases, analyzing technical documents, and comparing claims against prior art—are fundamentally digital information processing tasks where AI excels. While final legal judgment and complex negotiations require human accountability, AI tools are rapidly automating the discovery and drafting phases, significantly increasing individual productivity and reshaping the role into one of AI-assisted verification.

title: 犬訓練士
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation is physical, hands-on interaction with animals in unpredictable environments, which AI cannot replicate. While AI might assist with administrative tasks or health monitoring data, the essential work of behavioral training, physical care, and human-to-owner consultation remains deeply rooted in physical presence and biological understanding.

title: 独立系ファイナンシャル・アドバイザー（IFA）
exposure_rationale: IFA work is heavily data-driven, involving financial analysis, portfolio optimization, and market monitoring—tasks where AI excels and can automate significant portions of the technical workload. While the high-touch 'human-to-human' consulting and trust-building aspects provide a buffer, AI-driven robo-advisors and automated planning tools will increasingly handle the core analytical and administrative functions, significantly raising the productivity bar for human advisors.

title: 獣医師
exposure_rationale: AI will significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy through image analysis (X-rays, CT scans) and drug discovery research, which are core components of the field. However, the physical nature of surgery, emergency clinical care, and the handling of large livestock in unpredictable environments provide a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 理学療法士（PT）
exposure_rationale: Physical therapy is a highly hands-on occupation requiring manual manipulation, physical support of patients, and real-time observation of movement in a physical environment. While AI can significantly assist in diagnostic analysis, personalized treatment planning, and progress tracking, the core execution of the job remains a physical service that is difficult to automate in Japan's clinical and home-care settings.

title: 生産・品質管理技術者
exposure_rationale: This role involves heavy data analysis, scheduling, and cross-departmental coordination, all of which are being revolutionized by AI-driven supply chain optimization and predictive quality control. While it requires human judgment for inter-departmental negotiations and physical site inspections, the core tasks of planning and monitoring are increasingly automated in Japan's advanced manufacturing sector.

title: 産婦人科医
exposure_rationale: AI will significantly impact diagnostic tasks, such as analyzing fetal ultrasounds and identifying gynecological tumors, while also streamlining administrative documentation. However, the core of the role involves high-stakes physical surgery, emergency obstetric interventions, and sensitive human-to-human communication, which remain difficult to automate in Japan's current regulatory and cultural landscape.

title: 産業医
exposure_rationale: AI can significantly automate the analysis of health checkup data, stress surveys, and the drafting of legal medical opinions, which are core administrative tasks for industrial physicians. However, the role requires high-level human mediation between employers and employees, physical workplace inspections (職場巡視), and sensitive mental health counseling that relies on trust and nuanced interpersonal judgment.

title: 産業廃棄物処理技術者
exposure_rationale: This role combines digital knowledge work, such as data analysis, regulatory compliance, and process planning, with physical tasks like on-site inspections and laboratory analysis of hazardous materials. While AI can significantly optimize waste processing algorithms and automate reporting, the physical unpredictability of industrial waste and the high legal stakes of environmental safety in Japan necessitate human oversight and hands-on technical management.

title: 産業用ロボットの設置・設定
exposure_rationale: While the physical installation and wiring of robots require manual presence, the core tasks of system design, programming, and simulation are increasingly being automated by AI-driven 'no-code' tools and digital twin technology. In Japan's labor-short market, AI will significantly augment the productivity of Robot SIers by automating complex path-planning and troubleshooting, though the need for on-site human communication and physical adjustment remains.

title: 産業用ロボット開発技術者
exposure_rationale: This occupation is highly exposed because its core outputs—software coding, CAD design, and data analysis—are digital tasks where AI is rapidly advancing. While the job requires physical testing and hardware integration, AI is becoming a primary tool for optimizing robot trajectories, simulating mechanical stress, and developing the 'Physical AI' brains that govern modern industrial automation.

title: 畜産技術者
exposure_rationale: This role combines high-level knowledge work, such as biotechnology research and data analysis, with essential physical tasks like animal handling and on-site farm inspections. While AI can significantly optimize breeding programs, feed efficiency, and health monitoring through IoT sensors, the requirement for physical presence in unpredictable environments and manual procedures (e.g., artificial insemination) limits full automation.

title: 看護助手
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical labor and direct patient care, such as bathing, feeding, and moving patients, which are difficult for AI to automate in unpredictable hospital environments. While AI can streamline peripheral administrative tasks like inventory management and documentation, the high demand for human-to-human interaction and physical assistance in Japan's aging society keeps the exposure low.

title: 看護師
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist with diagnostic support, patient monitoring, and administrative documentation, the core of nursing involves physical procedures and high-touch emotional care. Japan's aging population ensures high demand for the human-centric aspects of the role, which remain difficult to automate due to physical complexity and regulatory requirements.

title: 知的財産コーディネーター
exposure_rationale: This role is primarily digital and knowledge-based, involving patent searches, document analysis, and legal strategy, all of which are being significantly disrupted by LLMs and specialized AI search tools. While it requires high-level human coordination between researchers and legal entities, AI can now automate the core tasks of drafting patent summaries, identifying prior art, and analyzing infringement risks, greatly increasing individual productivity and reducing the total headcount needed.

title: 知的財産サーチャー
exposure_rationale: This occupation is fundamentally digital, revolving around the collection, analysis, and synthesis of vast amounts of text-based data (patents and technical literature). Large Language Models (LLMs) are exceptionally well-suited for automating search query generation, summarizing complex technical documents, and identifying prior art, which are the core tasks of this role.

title: 社会保険労務士
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a Sharoushi—preparing complex legal documents, filing social insurance applications, and interpreting labor laws—are highly digital and data-driven, making them prime targets for AI automation and e-government integration. While high-level labor consulting and dispute resolution require human judgment, the bulk of the administrative and advisory work is susceptible to significant productivity gains and restructuring through AI.

title: 社会学研究者
exposure_rationale: Sociological researchers rely heavily on data analysis, literature reviews, and report writing, all of which are being significantly enhanced by LLMs and AI-driven statistical tools. While AI can automate large-scale qualitative coding and quantitative modeling, the core of the job still requires human-centric skills such as ethnographic interviewing, ethical judgment, and the creative synthesis of complex social theories.

title: 社会教育主事
exposure_rationale: This role involves significant knowledge work, such as curriculum planning, administrative reporting, and data analysis, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains. However, the core requirements of community coordination, interpersonal negotiation with local organizations (PTAs, youth groups), and hands-on guidance provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 科学捜査研究所鑑定技術職員
exposure_rationale: This occupation involves high-level knowledge work and data analysis, such as DNA profiling, voice analysis, and image processing, which are domains where AI excels at pattern recognition and speed. While physical lab work and legal accountability provide a buffer, AI will significantly automate the analytical and comparative tasks, shifting the human role toward final verification and expert testimony.

title: 税理士
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of tax preparation, document creation, and routine accounting are highly digital and susceptible to AI automation, especially with Japan's push for e-Tax and automated accounting software. While high-level tax strategy and representation in audits require human judgment and trust, the vast majority of the workload is data-driven and increasingly handled by sophisticated AI tools, leading to significant industry restructuring.

title: 精密機器技術者
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of conceptual design, CAD modeling, and simulation (CAE) are increasingly being augmented by generative design and AI-driven optimization, significantly boosting productivity. While physical prototyping and cross-departmental coordination provide a buffer, the shift toward digital twins and automated quality management in Japan's advanced manufacturing sector places this role in a high-exposure category.

title: 精神科医
exposure_rationale: Psychiatry involves a high degree of digital information processing, such as analyzing patient history and diagnostic data, where AI can significantly assist in diagnosis and treatment planning. However, the core of the role requires deep human-to-human empathy, complex ethical judgment, and the management of unpredictable physical behaviors in clinical settings, which remain difficult to automate.

title: 細胞検査士
exposure_rationale: The core task of a cytotechnologist—screening slides to identify abnormal or cancerous cells—is a high-stakes pattern recognition task that is increasingly being automated by AI-driven digital pathology and computer-aided detection (CAD) systems. While physical specimen preparation and final legal accountability by a physician remain, AI can now process thousands of cells with higher speed and often greater consistency than humans, significantly reducing the number of technicians needed for routine screening.

title: 経営コンサルタント
exposure_rationale: Management consulting involves heavy data analysis, report writing, and presentation drafting, all of which are being significantly automated or enhanced by generative AI. While high-level strategic judgment and human relationship management remain essential, AI drastically reduces the time required for the research and synthesis tasks that currently occupy a large portion of the workforce.

title: 義肢装具士
exposure_rationale: While AI and 3D scanning/printing are revolutionizing the design and modeling phases (CAD/CAM), the core of the job requires physical fitting, manual adjustments, and high-touch patient interaction. The need for medical judgment and physical craftsmanship in a clinical setting provides a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 翻訳者
exposure_rationale: Translation is a fundamentally digital task that has been profoundly disrupted by Large Language Models (LLMs), which now handle both literal translation and nuanced stylistic adjustments. While high-level literary translation and complex legal/technical 'post-editing' still require human oversight, the vast majority of industry translation (産業翻訳) is being automated or significantly compressed, drastically reducing the total human labor hours required per project.

title: 耐震診断
exposure_rationale: The core of the job requires physical on-site inspections of crawl spaces, attics, and structural joints, which are difficult to automate. However, AI will significantly streamline the high-stakes analytical portion, including image recognition for crack detection, automated 3D modeling from photos, and sophisticated structural simulation, reducing the time required for reporting and planning.

title: 職業訓練指導員
exposure_rationale: Vocational instructors face high exposure because AI can automate curriculum development, lecture preparation, and the teaching of theoretical knowledge. However, the role remains anchored by the need for physical safety supervision during hands-on technical training (e.g., welding, mechanics) and the high-touch nature of career counseling and student life guidance in Japan's public employment support system.

title: 臨床工学技士
exposure_rationale: Clinical Engineering Technologists perform a mix of physical equipment maintenance and real-time monitoring of life-support systems, which requires physical presence in hospitals. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic monitoring, predictive maintenance of machines, and automated adjustments of dialysis or ventilators, the high-stakes nature of life-support and the need for manual troubleshooting in clinical settings provide a buffer against full automation.

title: 臨床検査技師
exposure_rationale: AI and computer vision are highly effective at automating the analysis of specimens (digital pathology) and interpreting physiological data like ECGs or ultrasound images, which are core tasks. However, the role remains 'High' rather than 'Very High' because it requires physical presence for specimen collection, direct patient interaction during physiological testing, and manual handling of laboratory equipment in a clinical setting.

title: 自動車技術者
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of automotive engineers—designing via 3D-CAD, simulation, data analysis, and project management—are highly digital and increasingly enhanced by AI-driven generative design and automated testing. While physical inspection of prototypes and on-site factory supervision provide a buffer, the industry's shift toward CASE (Connected, Autonomous, Shared, Electric) technologies forces these engineers to work almost exclusively within digital and software-centric frameworks.

title: 自動車教習指導員
exposure_rationale: While the job requires physical presence and real-time intervention, AI and autonomous driving technologies are increasingly automating the core tasks of monitoring student errors and providing feedback. Japan is already seeing the introduction of 'AI instructors' for closed-course training, and as autonomous vehicle technology matures, the role will shift from active teaching to high-level supervision and safety management.

title: 自動運転開発エンジニア（自動車）
exposure_rationale: This is a high-level software and knowledge-based role where AI is both the primary tool and the core product being developed. While it requires some physical testing and hardware integration, the shift toward computer-based simulation and AI-driven 'perception, judgment, and operation' logic makes the workflow highly susceptible to AI-augmented coding, automated testing, and synthetic data generation.

title: 舞台照明スタッフ
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in the creative planning, 3D visualization, and automated programming of lighting sequences, the role remains heavily anchored in physical labor and real-time human coordination. Tasks such as the manual installation of heavy equipment, wiring, and adjusting fixtures in unpredictable physical environments provide a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 舞台美術スタッフ
exposure_rationale: Generative AI significantly impacts the design phase, allowing for rapid creation of concept art, 3D models, and costume sketches based on scripts. However, the role requires extensive physical presence for on-site checks, manual adjustments during rehearsals, and deep interpersonal collaboration with directors and actors, which limits full automation.

title: 航空管制官
exposure_rationale: Air traffic control is a high-stakes information processing role involving radar data, weather analysis, and complex spatial coordination, all of which are highly susceptible to AI optimization and automated decision-support. While Japan's strict safety regulations and the need for human accountability in emergency situations prevent full automation, AI will increasingly handle routine sequencing and conflict detection, significantly reshaping the workload.

title: 船員
exposure_rationale: While the core work involves physical labor and manual maintenance in unpredictable maritime environments, AI and autonomous navigation systems are increasingly automating route optimization, monitoring, and administrative tasks. Japan's severe labor shortage in the shipping industry is accelerating the adoption of 'smart ships,' which reduces the number of crew members needed per vessel even if physical presence remains necessary for emergencies and maintenance.

title: 英会話教師
exposure_rationale: The core product—language instruction and conversation practice—is increasingly digitized through AI tutors and LLMs that provide real-time feedback and personalized lesson plans. While human teachers in Japan still provide essential emotional support and cultural nuance for children and business professionals, AI significantly reduces the need for human-led grammar instruction and routine practice.

title: 薬学研究者
exposure_rationale: Pharmaceutical research is heavily impacted by AI-driven drug discovery (AI創薬), which significantly accelerates lead compound identification and molecular simulation. While physical laboratory experiments and clinical oversight remain necessary, the core cognitive tasks of data analysis, literature review, and predictive modeling are increasingly automated or enhanced by AI, leading to major shifts in researcher productivity.

title: 行政書士
exposure_rationale: The core of an Administrative Scrivener's work involves drafting legal documents and navigating complex regulations, tasks that are highly susceptible to Large Language Models and automated filing systems. While complex consulting and physical site visits provide some protection, the Japanese government's push for 'e-government' and digital transformation (DX) is rapidly automating the routine filing and document preparation that constitutes a large portion of this profession.

title: 衛生管理者
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical presence for workplace inspections (巡視) and interpersonal communication for mental health support and counseling, which are resistant to AI. However, the administrative aspects—such as analyzing health checkup data, monitoring environmental metrics, and staying updated on labor regulations—are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and efficiency gains.

title: 裁判官
exposure_rationale: Judges perform high-level knowledge work involving massive document review, legal research, and evidence synthesis, all of which are highly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains. While the final ethical judgment, sentencing, and human-centric mediation (especially in family court) remain human-led, AI will significantly automate the drafting of opinions and the analysis of precedents, fundamentally restructuring the workload.

title: 視能訓練士
exposure_rationale: While AI and automated imaging significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy and data analysis for eye conditions, the core of the job involves physical interaction with patients, especially children, and the manual operation of precision optical equipment. Japan's aging population ensures steady demand, but the role remains a mix of technical data processing and essential hands-on clinical care that cannot be fully digitized.

title: 言語聴覚士
exposure_rationale: AI can significantly assist in speech analysis, automated diagnostic testing, and generating personalized rehabilitation plans, which are core cognitive tasks. However, the physical nature of swallowing therapy (dysphagia) and the high emotional intelligence required to motivate patients with communication barriers provide a strong buffer against full automation.

title: 診療放射線技師
exposure_rationale: AI is rapidly advancing in medical image analysis (CT, MRI, X-ray), which automates the initial screening and anomaly detection tasks of the role. While the physical positioning of patients and the operation of complex machinery still require human presence, the core diagnostic support and quality control functions are highly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains.

title: 証券アナリスト
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of data collection, financial modeling, and report generation are highly digital and increasingly automated by LLMs and specialized AI tools. While high-level strategic judgment and direct corporate interviews provide a human moat, the vast majority of the analytical workload is susceptible to significant AI-driven restructuring and productivity gains.

title: 調教師
exposure_rationale: The core of a horse trainer's role involves physical interaction with animals, sensory evaluation of a horse's condition, and hands-on management of stable staff, which are difficult to automate. While AI can significantly optimize training schedules, diet plans, and race selection through data analysis, the high-stakes physical environment and the regulatory requirement for licensed human oversight limit total exposure.

title: 調香師
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves creating chemical 'recipes' (prescriptions) from thousands of ingredients, a task highly suited for AI-driven molecular modeling and predictive analytics. While the final sensory evaluation still requires a human nose, AI can now rapidly generate optimized formulas based on consumer trends and chemical compatibility, significantly reducing the time and number of human experts needed.

title: 農業技術者
exposure_rationale: This role involves significant knowledge work such as data analysis, policy planning, and technical research, which are highly susceptible to AI optimization. However, the requirement for physical field inspections, hands-on guidance to farmers, and managing unpredictable environmental factors in rural Japan provides a buffer against full automation.

title: 通訳者
exposure_rationale: The core product of interpretation is purely linguistic and digital, making it highly vulnerable to rapidly improving AI speech-to-speech translation. While high-stakes diplomatic or legal settings still require human nuance, routine business meetings and general interpretation are already being restructured or replaced by AI tools that offer lower costs and instant availability.

title: 通関士
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a Customs Broker (通関士) involve analyzing digital documents, classifying goods according to complex legal codes, and filing paperwork—all of which are highly susceptible to AI automation. While legal accountability and expert judgment remain necessary, AI can significantly automate the classification (HS codes) and document verification processes, drastically reducing the human labor required per declaration.

title: 速記者、音声反訳者
exposure_rationale: The core task of transcribing audio into text is a purely digital information-processing activity that is already being automated by advanced Speech-to-Text AI. While human oversight is still used for high-stakes environments like the National Diet, the rapid improvement in LLM-based context understanding and specialized terminology processing is making traditional stenography and manual transcription largely obsolete.

title: 造船技術者（船舶の開発・設計）
exposure_rationale: Shipbuilding engineers perform high-level knowledge work—including structural analysis, fluid dynamics (CFD), and 3D-CAD modeling—that is fundamentally digital and data-driven. While the job requires human-centric coordination between shipowners and manufacturing sites, AI is rapidly automating routine design calculations, optimizing hull shapes for fuel efficiency, and generating production data, significantly increasing individual productivity.

title: 運用・管理（IT）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of IT operations and management—monitoring systems, log analysis, incident response, and documentation—are increasingly being automated through AIOps (AI for IT Operations). While physical tasks like cable management and hardware replacement remain, the shift toward cloud infrastructure and remote monitoring in Japan allows AI to handle the vast majority of routine diagnostic and reporting work.

title: 鉄道車両の設計・開発
exposure_rationale: The core work is digital, involving 2D/3D CAD and complex simulations (aerodynamics, vibration, stress) where AI and generative design can significantly accelerate optimization. While it requires physical site visits and deep collaboration with manufacturers and railway operators, the transition toward automated design verification and AI-driven predictive modeling for safety standards makes this role highly susceptible to productivity shifts.

title: 陶磁器技術者
exposure_rationale: This role combines physical material science, manufacturing oversight, and artistic design, which limits full automation. While AI can significantly optimize material composition analysis, kiln firing simulations, and glaze development, the job still requires physical presence for site inspections, manual quality control, and the management of complex production hardware in a factory environment.

title: 雑誌編集者
exposure_rationale: Magazine editing is a predominantly digital knowledge-work role where AI can now perform core tasks such as drafting articles, summarizing content, copy editing, and generating layout ideas. While human judgment remains essential for high-level creative direction and managing interpersonal relationships with contributors, the rapid shift toward digital media in Japan and the high efficiency of AI in content production will lead to significant restructuring of the profession.

title: 雑誌記者
exposure_rationale: Magazine journalism is a digital-first knowledge profession where AI can already perform research, draft articles, and analyze data, significantly increasing productivity. While high-level investigative reporting and human interviews still require physical presence and trust-building, the core tasks of writing, editing, and content adaptation for digital platforms are highly exposed to AI automation.

title: 電子機器技術者
exposure_rationale: This role involves significant knowledge work, including circuit design, software programming, and data analysis, all of which are being heavily augmented by AI-powered CAD tools and automated testing. While physical prototyping and factory-floor troubleshooting provide a buffer against total automation, the core tasks of planning, technical documentation, and patent drafting are highly susceptible to AI-driven productivity gains.

title: 電気技術者
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as on-site inspections, climbing ladders, and manual repairs in unpredictable environments like tunnels or power stations. While AI will heavily assist in predictive maintenance, data analysis of electrical loads, and automated monitoring, the core requirement for human intervention in physical infrastructure and safety-critical decision-making limits total exposure.

title: 電気通信技術者
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of digital knowledge work, such as network design, demand forecasting, and capacity planning, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven optimization and automation. However, the job also requires physical site management, coordination with construction crews, and emergency hardware maintenance, creating a physical barrier that prevents full AI replacement.

title: 非鉄金属製錬技術者
exposure_rationale: This role combines high-level engineering analysis and production management, which are increasingly optimized by AI-driven predictive maintenance and process simulation. While physical presence at the smelting plant and human-centric management of site workers provide a buffer, the core tasks of data-driven quality control and process optimization are highly susceptible to AI integration in Japan's advanced manufacturing sector.

title: 音楽教室講師
exposure_rationale: While AI can assist with music theory, composition, and automated feedback on technical accuracy, the core of the job involves physical demonstration, real-time posture correction, and emotional mentorship. In Japan's aging society, the demand for human-to-human interaction and the 'hobbyist' experience for children and seniors provides a significant buffer against full automation.

title: 養護教諭
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate administrative tasks like health exam scheduling, data analysis, and injury reporting, the core of the role involves physical first aid and sensitive psychological counseling. In Japan's school system, the 'Yogo' teacher serves as a vital human emotional anchor for students facing bullying or mental health issues, a function that remains resistant to AI replacement due to the need for physical presence and high-stakes empathy.

title: 高分子化学技術者
exposure_rationale: This role is heavily impacted by AI-driven 'Materials Informatics,' which uses machine learning to predict molecular properties and optimize synthesis processes, significantly reducing trial-and-error in the lab. While physical experimentation and manufacturing oversight remain necessary, the core cognitive tasks of molecular design, data analysis, and performance simulation are highly susceptible to AI integration.

title: 高等学校教員
exposure_rationale: High school teachers face significant exposure as AI can automate lesson planning, grading, and personalized tutoring for specialized subjects. While the human elements of mentorship, club activities, and emotional support remain essential, Japan's labor shortage and the digital nature of curriculum delivery will likely lead to AI-driven restructuring of the instructional workload.

title: 麻酔科医
exposure_rationale: Anesthesiology involves high-stakes real-time monitoring and pharmacological adjustments that are increasingly assisted by AI-driven predictive analytics and automated delivery systems. However, the role requires significant physical dexterity for procedures like intubation and nerve blocks, as well as critical human judgment and communication in high-pressure surgical environments, limiting full automation.

title: CDショップ店員
exposure_rationale: While physical tasks like stocking shelves and managing in-store events remain, the core value-add of music curation, inventory forecasting, and promotional writing (POP/SNS) is highly susceptible to AI. Recommendation algorithms and generative AI can automate personalized music advice and marketing content, while Japan's labor shortage is driving the adoption of self-checkout and automated inventory systems in retail.

title: OA機器営業
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of analyzing client needs, proposing solutions, and creating sales materials are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and optimization. While physical site visits and relationship management remain important in the Japanese business context, the shift toward digital transformation (DX) means the products themselves and the sales process are becoming increasingly digitized, significantly reducing the headcount needed per sales volume.

title: せり人
exposure_rationale: The core task of matching buyers and sellers through price discovery is increasingly being digitized via electronic bidding systems and AI-driven price forecasting. While the job requires physical presence in the market and human judgment regarding product quality, the shift from traditional hand signals to digital platforms significantly increases the potential for AI to automate the matching and data analysis components of the role.

title: カフェ店員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical tasks like food preparation, cleaning, and manual service in a physical environment, which are difficult to automate fully. While AI and automation are increasingly handling ordering (self-kiosks) and inventory management, the human element of hospitality and the physical dexterity required for diverse cafe tasks keep exposure relatively low.

title: ガソリンスタンド・スタッフ
exposure_rationale: The core tasks are physical and site-dependent, involving vehicle handling, manual inspections, and equipment operation that AI cannot perform directly. While AI and automation (like self-service systems and POS integration) reduce the need for administrative staff, the remaining human roles focus on physical maintenance, safety monitoring, and customer service in a real-world environment.

title: コンサルティング営業（IT）
exposure_rationale: This role involves high-level knowledge work, including proposal writing, data analysis, and technical solution design, all of which are being significantly augmented by generative AI. While the core of the job relies on high-stakes human relationships and trust-building in the Japanese business context, AI will drastically reduce the time needed for market research, documentation, and technical translation, leading to higher productivity and potential workforce consolidation.

title: コンビニエンスストア店員
exposure_rationale: AI and automation are significantly impacting core tasks like inventory forecasting, automated ordering, and self-checkout systems, which are already prevalent in Japan. However, the role still requires substantial physical labor (restocking, cleaning, food prep) and human-to-human interaction for complex services and troubleshooting that remain difficult to fully automate in the near term.

title: シューフィッター
exposure_rationale: While AI and 3D scanning can automate precise foot measurement and initial shoe matching, the core of the job involves physical palpation, manual adjustment of insoles (packing work), and high-touch interpersonal consultation. Japan's aging population increases demand for this specialized health-oriented service, which requires a level of physical dexterity and empathetic communication that AI cannot yet fully replicate.

title: スポーツ用品販売
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate inventory management, trend forecasting, and personalized digital marketing, the core of the job involves physical store management, hands-on product fitting, and equipment repair. In Japan's aging society, the 'gaisho' (external sales) to schools and local teams also relies heavily on human relationships and physical presence that AI cannot yet replicate.

title: スーパーレジ係
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of scanning items and processing payments are already being heavily automated through self-checkout and RFID technology in Japan. While human staff remain for customer service and troubleshooting, Japan's severe labor shortage is aggressively driving the transition toward fully autonomous or AI-monitored checkout systems.

title: スーパー店員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical labor such as stocking shelves, handling fresh produce, and navigating a dynamic retail environment, which are difficult to automate fully. While AI can optimize inventory management, automated ordering, and self-checkout systems, the need for human presence for physical maintenance and customer assistance remains significant in the Japanese context.

title: ディーラー
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a dealer—analyzing market data, predicting price movements, and executing trades—are fundamentally digital and data-driven, making them highly susceptible to AI and algorithmic automation. High-frequency trading and AI-driven quantitative models have already replaced many traditional human roles in this field, and the trend toward autonomous execution and real-time global data processing continues to accelerate.

title: デパート店員
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate peripheral tasks like inventory management, data entry, and multilingual customer support via tablets, the core of the Japanese department store experience (omotenashi) relies on high-touch human interaction and physical presence. Japan's aging population and labor shortages will drive AI adoption for back-end efficiency, but cultural expectations for personalized, face-to-face service in luxury retail provide a significant buffer against full automation.

title: フラワーショップ店員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical tasks like handling delicate perishables, manual floral arrangement, and unpredictable customer interaction in a physical retail space. While AI can assist with inventory management, trend analysis for procurement, and generating design inspiration, the physical labor and sensory judgment required for 'mizuage' (water treatment) and bouquet creation remain difficult to automate.

title: ベーカリーショップ店員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical tasks like slicing bread, cleaning, arranging displays, and face-to-face customer service in a physical retail environment. While AI and automation are streamlining checkout (e.g., image-recognition registers) and inventory management, the requirement for manual dexterity and real-time human interaction in a physical shop keeps the exposure relatively low.

title: ペットショップ店員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical animal care, cleaning, and manual handling of goods, which are difficult to automate. While AI can assist with inventory management and providing specialized advice on pet health or products, the requirement for real-time human interaction and physical presence in a retail environment limits overall exposure.

title: ホームセンター店員
exposure_rationale: While inventory management, ordering, and basic product inquiries can be automated via AI and robotics, the core job requires significant physical labor such as stocking heavy DIY materials and providing hands-on advice for complex home improvement projects. Japan's labor shortage is driving AI adoption in retail logistics, but the physical nature of handling diverse hardware goods remains a barrier to full automation.

title: メガネ販売
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in frame selection (virtual try-on), lens optimization, and automated vision testing, the core of the job involves physical fitting (adjusting frames to the wearer's ears/nose) and manual repairs. Japan's aging population also maintains a high demand for in-person consultation and tactile service that cannot be fully digitized.

title: リサイクルショップ店員
exposure_rationale: AI significantly impacts the core task of appraisal and pricing by automating market data analysis and image recognition for item identification. However, the job remains moderately exposed because it requires physical labor (cleaning, repairing, and moving heavy goods) and nuanced face-to-face negotiation and customer service in a physical retail environment.

title: 代理店営業（保険会社）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of providing product information, explaining complex regulations, and analyzing market data are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and augmentation. While the role requires high-level relationship management (solicitor work), AI can significantly streamline the administrative support, training, and sales strategy components, allowing fewer employees to manage a larger number of agencies.

title: 住宅・不動産営業
exposure_rationale: While the core of the job involves high-touch human interaction and physical site visits, AI is rapidly automating the information-heavy aspects like property matching, market analysis, and legal/tax consultations. In Japan's shrinking market, AI-driven productivity will likely reduce the number of sales staff needed by streamlining lead generation and contract preparation.

title: 保険営業（生命保険、損害保険）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of analyzing risk, calculating premiums, and designing personalized insurance plans are highly digital and data-driven, making them prime targets for AI optimization. While the 'human touch' and trust-building remain critical in the Japanese market, AI-driven platforms and chatbots are increasingly handling lead generation, routine inquiries, and policy comparisons, significantly reducing the number of human agents required.

title: 化粧品訪問販売
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate skin analysis, product recommendations, and sales planning, the core of this role relies on physical door-to-door visits and building long-term human trust, especially among Japan's aging population. The shift toward digital sales channels is a threat, but the 'last mile' of physical interaction and personalized beauty coaching remains difficult to fully automate.

title: 化粧品販売/美容部員
exposure_rationale: While AI and AR can provide skin analysis and virtual makeup simulations, the core of the job involves physical application of products and high-touch interpersonal counseling. In Japan's luxury retail culture, the 'Omotenashi' aspect and the physical sensory experience of testing products remain significant barriers to full automation.

title: 医薬品販売/登録販売者
exposure_rationale: The core task of providing drug information and advice is highly susceptible to AI-driven knowledge retrieval and chatbots, which can handle complex drug interactions and recommendations. However, the role remains grounded in a physical retail environment involving manual tasks like stocking shelves, inventory management, and face-to-face customer service that requires human empathy and physical presence.

title: 医薬情報担当者（MR）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of an MR—synthesizing medical data, creating presentation materials, and providing drug information—are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and digital transformation. While the relationship-building aspect with doctors requires human presence, the increasing trend of physicians accessing information via digital portals and AI chatbots significantly reduces the need for a large human workforce in this sector.

title: 印刷営業
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of printing sales—proposal writing, cost estimation, layout planning, and proofreading—are increasingly digital and highly susceptible to AI automation. While the role requires human relationship management, the shift toward web-based ordering and AI-driven design tools significantly reduces the manual coordination and administrative labor traditionally required.

title: 商社営業
exposure_rationale: Trading company sales (shosha eigyo) involve heavy information processing, market analysis, and logistics coordination, all of which are highly susceptible to AI optimization and automation. While high-level relationship management and strategic investment decisions require human judgment, the routine aspects of trade documentation, credit checks, and market research are increasingly handled by digital tools, significantly increasing individual productivity and reducing the need for large administrative support teams.

title: 広告営業
exposure_rationale: Advertising sales involves significant digital knowledge work, including market analysis, proposal creation, and performance reporting, all of which are being heavily automated by AI. While high-level relationship management and creative strategy still require human judgment, AI's ability to optimize media buying and generate data-driven insights significantly reduces the manual labor required for each account.

title: 携帯電話販売
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of plan selection, contract processing, and technical troubleshooting are increasingly handled by AI-driven chatbots and automated online portals, leading to a shift toward self-service. While physical presence is still needed for hardware handling and assisting elderly customers, the high digital nature of the transactions and Japan's trend toward store consolidation and online-first sales significantly increase exposure.

title: 書店員
exposure_rationale: While the job involves physical tasks like shelving and inventory handling, core value-added tasks such as curation, writing POP advertisements, and inventory planning are highly susceptible to AI optimization. AI-driven recommendation engines and automated ordering systems are increasingly replacing human judgment in stock management and sales promotion within the Japanese retail landscape.

title: 空港グランドスタッフ
exposure_rationale: Core administrative tasks like ticketing, passport verification, and baggage check-in are increasingly automated via kiosks and AI-driven facial recognition. However, the role remains moderately exposed rather than highly exposed because it requires significant physical presence for passenger boarding assistance, handling irregular operations (delays/cancellations), and providing high-touch hospitality for elderly or disabled travelers.

title: 自動車営業
exposure_rationale: While the job requires physical presence for test drives and vehicle delivery, much of the core work—product explanation, financing calculations, insurance processing, and lead management—is highly susceptible to AI automation. In Japan's aging market, AI-driven CRM and virtual showrooms are increasingly replacing traditional door-to-door sales, shifting the role toward high-level relationship management and complex consulting.

title: 自転車販売
exposure_rationale: The core of this job involves physical assembly, mechanical repair, and hands-on safety inspections, which are difficult to automate with AI. While AI can assist with inventory management, sales recommendations, and customer communication, the physical nature of maintaining bicycles and the interpersonal requirement of safety education provide a strong buffer against displacement.

title: 衣料品販売
exposure_rationale: While core tasks involve physical presence, tactile product handling, and real-time interpersonal styling advice, AI is significantly impacting peripheral tasks like inventory management, trend forecasting, and personalized marketing (SNS/DM). The rise of AI-driven virtual fitting and automated checkout systems reduces the need for human staff in routine sales, though high-end 'fashion advising' remains a human-centric service.

title: 証券外務員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of market analysis, financial modeling, and personalized asset allocation are highly susceptible to AI automation and enhancement. While high-net-worth and corporate clients still value human trust and face-to-face consulting, the rise of robo-advisors and AI-driven insights significantly reduces the need for human labor in routine brokerage and basic advisory roles.

title: 銀行・信用金庫渉外担当
exposure_rationale: While the role requires high-touch physical visits and trust-building, the core tasks of financial analysis, risk assessment, and document preparation are highly susceptible to AI automation. AI can generate personalized investment proposals and loan assessments more efficiently, shifting the human role toward relationship management while significantly reducing the headcount needed for back-office analysis and routine advisory.

title: 電器店店員
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant physical component, including product installation, repairs, and in-person customer service, which are resistant to AI. However, AI will heavily impact the knowledge-based tasks such as inventory management, sales forecasting, and providing technical product comparisons, which are increasingly handled by digital tools and AI-driven kiosks.

title: 食品営業（食品メーカー）
exposure_rationale: While the core of the job involves physical presence for product sampling, shelf stocking, and relationship-building, the analytical side—market trend analysis, data-driven sales presentations, and proposal writing—is highly susceptible to AI automation. AI can significantly streamline the creation of sales strategies and demand forecasting, though Japan's emphasis on face-to-face 'route sales' and physical coordination with retailers provides a buffer against full automation.

title: 駅構内売店店員
exposure_rationale: While inventory management and sales tracking are increasingly automated by AI and digital systems, the core job requires physical presence for restocking, handling physical returns, and managing a small physical space. In Japan, the shift toward unmanned 'smart kiosks' and vending machines represents a significant threat, but the remaining human roles are defined by physical labor and manual dexterity in a high-traffic environment.

title: 入国警備官
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in information gathering, document analysis, and real-time translation during investigations, the core of the job involves physical enforcement, arrests, facility security, and the physical escorting of deportees. These high-stakes, unpredictable physical tasks and the exercise of legal authority in person provide a strong buffer against full AI automation.

title: 冷凍加工食品製造
exposure_rationale: While Japan's food processing industry is increasingly automated, the core tasks of sorting fresh ingredients and performing delicate pre-processing (peeling, deboning) still rely heavily on manual human dexterity and sensory judgment. AI will primarily impact the peripheral supervisory roles, quality control via computer vision, and production scheduling, but the physical nature of the work in wet, cold environments remains a significant barrier to full AI replacement.

title: 刑務官
exposure_rationale: The core of the role involves physical security, manual surveillance, and high-stakes interpersonal counseling for rehabilitation, which are difficult to automate. While AI can enhance security through facial recognition and automate administrative reporting, the legal and ethical requirements for human oversight in a correctional setting remain a significant barrier to replacement.

title: 救急救命士
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical emergency medical procedures and real-time decision-making in unpredictable, high-stress environments that require human presence. While AI will significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy, optimize ambulance routing, and automate reporting, the physical nature of life-saving interventions and the legal requirement for human accountability in Japan's public safety sector limit full automation.

title: 施設警備員
exposure_rationale: While AI-powered surveillance, facial recognition, and autonomous patrol robots are increasingly automating monitoring and detection tasks, the role still requires physical intervention, emergency response, and human judgment in unpredictable situations. Japan's severe labor shortage in this sector accelerates AI adoption for 'mechanical security,' but the legal and physical necessity of human guards for onsite response remains a significant barrier to full automation.

title: 水族館飼育員
exposure_rationale: The core of this job involves physical labor in unpredictable environments, such as cleaning tanks, preparing food, and performing animal shows, which are difficult to automate. While AI can significantly enhance water quality monitoring, disease detection via computer vision, and administrative scheduling, the requirement for hands-on care and physical presence remains essential.

title: 海上保安官
exposure_rationale: While AI will significantly enhance maritime surveillance, data analysis for 'Oceanographic Information,' and autonomous navigation systems, the core of the job involves physical law enforcement, search and rescue, and emergency response in unpredictable marine environments. These high-stakes, hands-on tasks require human presence and physical intervention that cannot be fully automated in the next decade.

title: 消防官
exposure_rationale: The core of firefighting is highly physical and requires real-time human presence in unpredictable, dangerous environments, which limits direct AI replacement. However, AI will increasingly assist in peripheral tasks such as fire cause analysis, predictive dispatching, and administrative reporting, as well as enhancing situational awareness through drone data and sensor integration.

title: 潜水士
