exposure_rationale: Divers perform manual labor in highly unpredictable, high-pressure underwater environments that require physical dexterity and real-time human teamwork. While ROVs and underwater drones are increasingly used for inspection, the core tasks of construction, welding, and rescue remain physical and difficult to automate with current AI or robotics.

title: 税関職員
exposure_rationale: Customs work involves a high volume of digital data processing for import/export declarations and risk assessment, which is highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and predictive modeling. However, the role retains a significant physical component—including manual inspections, canine handling, and face-to-face passenger screening—that requires human presence and sensory judgment in unpredictable environments.

title: 自然保護官（レンジャー）
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical field work, such as patrolling national parks, maintaining trails, and managing wildlife, which AI cannot perform. However, the administrative aspects—including policy planning, development permit reviews, and data analysis for conservation—are highly susceptible to AI-driven efficiency gains, and remote sensing/AI monitoring will likely augment their environmental oversight capabilities.

title: 航空自衛官
exposure_rationale: The role is a hybrid of high-exposure digital tasks (radar monitoring, weapon systems control, and flight data analysis) and low-exposure physical tasks (aircraft maintenance, disaster rescue, and physical security). While AI will significantly automate surveillance and tactical decision-support systems, the requirement for human accountability in lethal force and physical presence in unpredictable environments maintains a moderate exposure level.

title: 警察官（都道府県警察）
exposure_rationale: While AI significantly enhances investigative capabilities through facial recognition, predictive policing, and automated document processing, the core of the job remains physical and interpersonal. Tasks such as making arrests, patrolling physical locations, responding to emergencies, and providing human-centric victim support cannot be automated by AI.

title: 道路パトロール隊員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical intervention, such as removing road debris and managing traffic at accident scenes, which AI cannot perform. While AI and smart sensors will automate road monitoring and report writing, the requirement for real-time human response in unpredictable outdoor environments keeps exposure low.

title: 陸上自衛官
exposure_rationale: The core of the role involves physical combat, disaster relief, and manual maintenance in unpredictable environments, which are highly resistant to AI. However, exposure is moderate because modern warfare and logistics (intelligence, communication, and supply chain management) are increasingly driven by AI-enhanced data analysis and autonomous systems, requiring soldiers to interface with high-tech tools.

title: 雑踏・交通誘導警備員
exposure_rationale: The core of the job requires physical presence in unpredictable outdoor environments and real-time human interaction, which are difficult to automate fully. While AI-driven traffic signals, drones, and wearable cameras are increasing productivity and reducing the number of personnel needed per site, the legal requirement for human oversight and the need to assist pedestrians or handle emergencies provide a significant floor for human labor.

title: 麻薬取締官
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical fieldwork, including arrests, onsite inspections, and forensic drug testing, which are resistant to AI. However, AI will heavily transform the investigative side, particularly in cybercrime tracking, international data analysis, and monitoring pharmaceutical distribution chains for irregularities.

title: きもの着付指導員
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves physical, hands-on instruction and the tactile manipulation of fabric on a human body, which is difficult to automate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like history lessons, scheduling, or generating marketing content for schools, the essential value lies in real-time human interaction, etiquette coaching, and physical demonstrations of traditional craftsmanship.

title: すし職人
exposure_rationale: While AI and robotics can automate routine tasks like rice preparation and basic assembly in conveyor-belt sushi chains, high-end sushi chefs rely on sensory judgment for fish selection and complex interpersonal hospitality. The core of the profession involves physical dexterity and real-time social interaction, though AI may assist in inventory management and sourcing data.

title: そば・うどん調理人
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical food preparation, manual dexterity for noodle making, and real-time sensory judgment in a kitchen environment. While AI can optimize inventory management and chain-store scheduling, the physical act of cooking and the 'hospitality heart' (omotenashi) required in traditional Japanese eateries remain difficult to automate fully.

title: アロマセラピスト
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical touch and manual treatment (body/facial massage) in a highly personalized, sensory environment that AI cannot replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like oil blending recommendations, scheduling, and customer consultation, the primary value lies in human-to-human interaction and physical presence, which are resistant to automation.

title: エステティシャン
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical, hands-on treatment and manual dexterity that is difficult to automate with current robotics. While AI can enhance skin analysis, counseling, and administrative tasks, the high value placed on human touch, emotional empathy, and real-time physical adjustment to a client's comfort creates a significant barrier to replacement.

title: キャディ
exposure_rationale: While AI and GPS technology can automate core information tasks like distance measuring and club selection advice, the job remains heavily physical and interpersonal. The role involves physical labor, safety monitoring, and hospitality in an unpredictable outdoor environment, which are difficult to fully automate, though the rise of 'self-play' assisted by digital tools reduces the overall demand for the role.

title: クリーニング師
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical handling of garments, stain identification, and manual pressing/finishing, which are difficult to automate fully with current AI. While AI can optimize logistics, scheduling, and chemical selection, the legal requirement for a human supervisor and the physical dexterity needed for delicate fabrics provide a significant buffer against total AI replacement.

title: ソムリエ
exposure_rationale: While AI can excel at data-driven wine pairing recommendations and inventory management, the core of the profession involves physical service, sensory tasting, and high-touch hospitality. In Japan's fine dining culture, the human element of storytelling and real-time social interaction remains a critical component that AI cannot physically replicate.

title: ツアーコンダクター
exposure_rationale: AI significantly impacts the desk-work components of this role, such as itinerary planning, destination research, and post-trip reporting. However, the core of the job requires physical presence to manage logistics, handle real-time emergencies, and provide human-to-human hospitality, which remains difficult to automate in unpredictable travel environments.

title: トリマー
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a pet groomer involve highly manual, tactile work with live animals in an unpredictable physical environment, which is extremely difficult for AI or robotics to replicate. While AI might assist with administrative tasks like booking or analyzing pet health data, the physical grooming, handling, and creative styling remain human-centric.

title: ネイリスト
exposure_rationale: While AI-powered nail printing robots and automated design generators are emerging, the core of the job remains a highly tactile, physical service requiring manual dexterity and real-time human interaction. The emotional labor of 'healing' and 'stress relief' mentioned in the description, combined with the physical complexity of cuticle care and 3D art, provides a significant buffer against full automation.

title: バーテンダー
exposure_rationale: While automated cocktail machines and AI inventory management can handle technical mixing and stock tasks, the core of the profession in Japan relies on physical dexterity, hospitality (Omotenashi), and real-time social interaction. The role functions as a 'social anchor' in nightlife, making the human presence and interpersonal communication difficult to replace with AI.

title: ビデオレンタル店店員
exposure_rationale: The core functions of this role—transaction processing, inventory management, and customer data handling—are already being replaced by self-checkout systems and automated kiosks. Furthermore, the entire business model is being decimated by AI-driven digital streaming platforms, making the physical occupation increasingly obsolete in the Japanese market.

title: フロント（ホテル・旅館）
exposure_rationale: Core administrative tasks like reservations, check-ins, and payments are already being automated via kiosks and mobile apps, a trend accelerated by Japan's 2018 Hotel Business Act amendment. While high-end 'omotenashi' service requires human presence, AI-driven translation and concierge bots are increasingly handling information queries, significantly reducing the human labor required for routine front-desk operations.

title: ブライダルコーディネーター
exposure_rationale: AI can significantly automate the digital aspects of this role, such as generating creative themes, creating detailed cost estimates, and managing complex scheduling and vendor logistics. However, the core of the job remains deeply rooted in high-stakes emotional labor, physical venue management, and real-time crisis handling, which provides a buffer against full automation in the Japanese cultural context.

title: ベビーシッター
exposure_rationale: The core of babysitting involves physical care, safety management, and emotional interaction in an unpredictable home environment, which AI cannot replicate. While AI may assist with peripheral tasks like scheduling, reporting, or providing educational activity ideas, the fundamental requirement for human presence and trust-based childcare remains a significant barrier to automation.

title: ホテル・旅館支配人
exposure_rationale: While the core of the job involves physical facility management and high-touch hospitality (omotenashi), the role is increasingly driven by digital tasks like dynamic pricing, revenue management, and labor scheduling where AI excels. In Japan's labor-shortage economy, managers will rely heavily on AI for operational efficiency and strategic positioning, though the final human-to-human accountability and leadership remain essential.

title: ホールスタッフ（レストラン）
exposure_rationale: While AI and robotics are increasingly handling routine tasks like order-taking via tablets and food delivery via serving robots, the core of the job remains physical and interpersonal. In Japan's hospitality culture (Omotenashi), human presence is essential for high-touch service, cleaning, and managing unpredictable customer needs, though labor shortages are accelerating the automation of peripheral tasks.

title: マンション管理員
exposure_rationale: While AI and IoT can automate monitoring, facility bookings, and basic reporting, the core of the job involves physical inspections, manual tasks like light bulb replacement, and handling unpredictable human interactions. In Japan's aging society, the 'human face' of the building provides a sense of security that is difficult to replace entirely with digital systems, though administrative tasks will be streamlined.

title: メイクアップアーティスト
exposure_rationale: The core of the job requires physical application of cosmetics to human skin and real-time adjustments on film sets, which are tasks currently beyond the reach of robotics. While AI can assist in the creative planning phase (generating mood boards or simulating looks digitally), the high-touch nature and the requirement for a Japanese beautician license (美容師免許) provide significant protection against automation.

title: ラーメン調理人
exposure_rationale: The core tasks are physical and sensory, involving manual food preparation, cooking in a hot environment, and real-time customer hospitality. While AI can optimize inventory management, menu pricing, and automated ordering systems, the physical act of crafting a specific 'flavor' and the manual labor of a kitchen remain difficult to fully automate in non-chain, artisanal settings.

title: リフレクソロジスト
exposure_rationale: Reflexology is a highly physical, hands-on occupation that requires precise manual manipulation and real-time human interaction in a physical environment. While AI may assist with administrative tasks or health advice, the core value of the service—physical touch and relaxation—cannot be replicated by digital AI tools.

title: レンタカー店舗スタッフ
exposure_rationale: The role involves a significant amount of physical labor, such as vehicle cleaning, inspection, and moving cars, which are resistant to AI. However, the administrative and customer service components—including bookings, contract explanations, and fleet management—are increasingly being automated through self-service kiosks, mobile apps, and AI-driven scheduling systems.

title: 中華料理調理人
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve high-heat cooking, manual dexterity with heavy woks, and sensory judgment that are difficult to automate in a traditional kitchen setting. However, AI and robotics are increasingly handling prep work (cutting/chopping) and standardized cooking in chain restaurants, while AI-driven systems optimize inventory and menu planning to address Japan's labor shortages.

title: 介護支援専門員/ケアマネジャー
exposure_rationale: Care managers perform heavy administrative and data-driven tasks, such as assessment analysis and care plan documentation, which are highly susceptible to AI automation and optimization. However, the role requires significant human-to-human interaction, ethical judgment, and physical home visits to monitor elderly clients, creating a baseline of human necessity that prevents full automation.

title: 児童発達支援管理責任者
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in drafting Individualized Support Plans (ISPs) and analyzing assessment data, the core of the role involves high-stakes human interaction, physical observation of children, and complex family counseling. Japan's regulatory requirements for mandatory placement and the deep cultural emphasis on 'human-centered' care in the welfare sector act as significant barriers to full automation.

title: 児童相談所相談員
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in analyzing case histories, drafting reports, and providing diagnostic support for psychological assessments, the core of the job involves high-stakes physical interventions, home visits, and building deep emotional trust with children and families. Japan's legal framework and the sensitive nature of child welfare require human accountability and interpersonal judgment that cannot be replaced by digital tools.

title: 医療ソーシャルワーカー
exposure_rationale: Medical social workers perform a mix of complex information processing (navigating social security systems and legal documents) and high-touch interpersonal counseling. While AI can significantly streamline administrative tasks, case documentation, and resource matching, the core of the job requires building trust with patients in crisis and conducting physical home visits, which are resistant to automation.

title: 客室乗務員
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate information-based tasks like safety briefings, duty-free sales, and entry document assistance, the core of the job involves physical safety management, emergency response, and high-touch hospitality. Japan's aging population and labor shortages may lead to more AI-driven service robots in cabins, but regulatory requirements for human presence during emergencies maintain a significant barrier to full automation.

title: 家政婦（夫）
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a housekeeper—cleaning, cooking, and providing physical care in a private home—require high physical dexterity and navigation of unpredictable, non-standardized environments. While AI may assist with peripheral scheduling or meal planning, the physical nature of the work and the human-to-human interaction required for childcare and elderly care provide a strong buffer against AI replacement.

title: 接客担当（ホテル・旅館）
exposure_rationale: While AI can automate information-based tasks like concierge recommendations, language translation, and booking management, the core of the role involves physical labor (carrying luggage, serving meals) and high-touch 'omotenashi' hospitality. Japan's labor shortage will drive AI adoption for peripheral tasks, but the cultural value placed on human-to-human service in ryokans and luxury hotels creates a significant barrier to full automation.

title: 施設介護員
exposure_rationale: The core of this role involves high-touch physical care (bathing, feeding, mobility) and emotional support in unpredictable environments, which AI cannot replicate. While AI and robotics can assist with peripheral tasks like monitoring, documentation, and heavy lifting, Japan's cultural emphasis on human-to-human care and the physical nature of the work keep exposure low.

title: 施設管理者（介護施設）
exposure_rationale: As a management role, AI will significantly streamline administrative tasks such as shift scheduling, compliance monitoring, and financial reporting, which currently consume much of a facility manager's time. However, the core of the job involves high-stakes human-to-human interaction, including staff leadership, family mediation, and community relations, which remain difficult to automate in Japan's culturally sensitive care sector.

title: 日本料理調理人（板前）
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical manual dexterity, sensory evaluation (taste/smell), and artistic presentation that are difficult to automate. While AI can optimize inventory management, seasonal menu planning, and 'dandori' (workflow scheduling), the physical act of preparing high-end Japanese cuisine remains deeply human-centric and culturally significant.

title: 洋菓子製造、パティシエ
exposure_rationale: The core of a pastry chef's work involves physical dexterity, sensory judgment (taste/smell), and artistic decoration in a non-digital environment, which are difficult for AI to replicate. While AI can assist in recipe optimization, inventory management, and trend analysis, the physical production and delicate finishing of high-end sweets remain human-centric, especially in Japan's artisanal 'depachika' and boutique culture.

title: 理容師
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a barber—haircutting, shaving, and physical styling—require high manual dexterity and real-time adaptation to unique human physical features in a non-digital environment. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like booking, inventory, or trend analysis, the physical nature of the service and the cultural importance of human interaction in Japanese barbershops provide a strong buffer against automation.

title: 福祉ソーシャルワーカー
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate documentation, legal research, and the matching of clients to administrative services, the core of the role requires high-level empathy, complex interpersonal negotiation, and physical home visits. In Japan's aging society, the human-centric coordination between families, medical institutions, and government agencies remains a critical barrier to full AI replacement.

title: 福祉事務所ケースワーカー
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate administrative tasks like report writing, eligibility calculations, and legal research, the core of the job requires physical home visits and high-stakes interpersonal empathy. Japan's complex social safety net and the need for human judgment in sensitive domestic situations provide a strong barrier against full automation.

title: 福祉用具専門相談員
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly assist in selecting optimal equipment based on medical data and generating mandatory service plans, the core of the job requires physical home visits to assess residential architecture and perform manual adjustments of equipment. The role also demands high-touch interpersonal communication and coordination with other healthcare professionals, which are resistant to full automation in Japan's aging society.

title: 納棺師
exposure_rationale: The core of this occupation involves highly delicate physical tasks such as post-mortem treatment, dressing, and restorative makeup that require manual dexterity and sensory judgment. Furthermore, the role demands deep emotional intelligence and empathy to support grieving families in a culturally sensitive, real-time environment, making it highly resistant to AI replacement.

title: 給食調理員
exposure_rationale: The core tasks are physical and manual, involving large-scale cooking, cleaning, and equipment operation in a high-temperature environment. While AI can optimize menu planning, inventory management, and food safety monitoring (HACCP), the physical labor of preparing ingredients and handling industrial kitchen machinery remains difficult to automate fully without expensive specialized robotics.

title: 美容師
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a beautician—cutting, coloring, and styling hair—require high-precision manual dexterity and physical interaction in an unpredictable environment that AI cannot currently replicate. While AI can assist with peripheral tasks like scheduling, customer records (karute), and AI-driven hairstyle simulations for consultations, the physical service remains a human-centric necessity in Japan's service economy.

title: 老人福祉施設生活相談員
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate the heavy administrative burden of documentation, contract processing, and inter-agency coordination, the core of the role involves high-stakes interpersonal mediation and emotional support for elderly residents and their families. Japan's regulatory environment and the cultural emphasis on 'omotenashi' in care settings create a buffer against full automation, though AI will likely become a mandatory tool for managing the labor shortage.

title: 葬祭ディレクター
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly streamline administrative tasks like scheduling, document preparation, and religious consultation logistics, the core of the role involves physical labor (transporting bodies, setting up venues) and high-touch emotional support for grieving families. Japan's cultural emphasis on ritual precision and human empathy in funeral services creates a strong barrier against full automation of the director's role.

title: 西洋料理調理人（コック）
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical dexterity, sensory judgment (taste/smell), and manual preparation in a high-heat environment, which are difficult to automate with current AI. However, AI is increasingly used for menu optimization, inventory management, and nutritional analysis, and Japan's labor shortage is driving the adoption of automated cooking robots for routine prep tasks (the 'shita-shirae' phase).

title: 訪問介護のサービス提供責任者
exposure_rationale: While AI can significantly automate administrative tasks like care plan drafting, scheduling, and billing, the core of the role requires high-level human coordination, physical home visits, and emotional intelligence to manage family dynamics and staff. Japan's severe labor shortage in elder care will drive AI adoption for efficiency, but the regulatory requirement for human oversight and the physical nature of the work provide a strong buffer.

title: 訪問介護員/ホームヘルパー
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a home helper—physical care (bathing, toileting, feeding) and household chores—require physical presence and manual dexterity in unpredictable private home environments, which are difficult to automate. While AI can optimize scheduling and documentation, Japan's cultural emphasis on human-to-human empathy and the physical nature of the work provide a strong barrier against AI replacement.

title: 調理補助
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of a kitchen assistant involve physical labor in unpredictable environments, such as washing ingredients, manual cutting, and cleaning, which are difficult to fully automate with current AI. While AI can optimize scheduling and inventory management, the high demand for human labor in Japan's aging society and the physical nature of the work keep exposure relatively low.

title: 通訳ガイド
exposure_rationale: The core functions of language translation and information provision are highly susceptible to real-time AI translation devices and multimodal AI assistants. While the physical 'tour leader' role and interpersonal hospitality (omotenashi) provide a buffer, the demand for human guides will likely shift toward high-end, specialized niche experiences as general guiding becomes automated.

title: 遊園地スタッフ
exposure_rationale: The core tasks involve physical safety monitoring, crowd control, and interpersonal hospitality in a dynamic outdoor environment, which are difficult to automate fully. While AI can optimize ticketing, scheduling, and predictive maintenance for equipment, the high demand for human-to-human interaction and the physical nature of the work in Japan's service-oriented theme park culture limit total exposure.

title: 障害福祉サービス管理責任者
exposure_rationale: The role involves significant administrative and documentation tasks, such as creating 'Individual Support Plans' and monitoring progress, which are highly susceptible to AI-driven automation and drafting assistance. However, the core of the job requires deep human empathy, complex interpersonal communication with non-verbal or distressed individuals, and high-level coordination between medical, government, and family stakeholders that AI cannot yet replicate in a physical care setting.

title: 障害者グループホーム世話人
exposure_rationale: The core of this role involves physical assistance (cooking, cleaning, medication administration) and complex interpersonal mediation within a shared living environment. While AI can assist with administrative tasks, scheduling, and monitoring health data, the high degree of physical presence and emotional intelligence required to support residents with disabilities makes it highly resistant to automation.

title: 障害者福祉施設指導専門員（生活支援員、就労支援員等）
exposure_rationale: The core of this role involves high-touch human interaction, emotional empathy, and physical presence to support individuals with disabilities, which are resistant to AI replacement. While AI can significantly streamline administrative tasks, case documentation, and job-matching analysis, the fundamental requirement for building trust and providing real-time behavioral guidance in unpredictable social environments keeps exposure low.

title: 飲食チェーン店店員
exposure_rationale: While core tasks like physical food preparation and cleaning require human presence, the occupation is highly manualized, making it susceptible to AI-driven optimization in scheduling, inventory management, and automated ordering systems. Japan's severe labor shortage is already accelerating the use of AI for customer service (voice-recognition kiosks) and robotic food delivery, though manual dexterity and human hospitality remain essential.

title: 駐車場管理
exposure_rationale: While routine tasks like payment and ticketing are already automated, the core job involves physical presence for vehicle guidance, safety inspections, and facility maintenance. AI and IoT will improve remote monitoring and security, but the need for human intervention in unpredictable physical environments and manual troubleshooting keeps exposure relatively low.

title: さく井工/ボーリング工
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: This occupation is primarily physical, involving the assembly of heavy machinery, site preparation, and manual labor in unpredictable outdoor environments. While AI and sensors can improve geological data analysis and drilling precision, the core tasks require human presence, physical strength, and real-time mechanical troubleshooting that cannot be digitized or easily automated by AI.

title: クレーン運転士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While crane operation is increasingly influenced by digital controls and semi-automation, the core job remains a physical operation in unpredictable environments like construction sites and ports. AI and sensors assist with safety and precision, but the high-stakes nature of moving heavy loads and the need for real-time human coordination with ground crews (slings/rigging) limit full AI replacement in the near term.

title: タクシー運転手
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology poses a long-term existential threat to this role, Japan's current regulatory environment and the physical requirements of passenger assistance (luggage, elderly care, and emergency response) provide a significant buffer. AI currently acts as a productivity enhancer through optimized dispatch apps and navigation, but the core task remains a physical service in an unpredictable environment that is not yet fully automatable in the near term.

title: タンクローリー乗務員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core of the job involves physical handling of hazardous materials, manual connection of hoses, and on-site safety inspections that require human presence and sensory judgment. While autonomous driving technology may eventually automate the transit portion, the high-risk nature of loading/unloading volatile liquids and gases in unpredictable physical environments creates significant regulatory and technical barriers to full AI replacement.

title: ダンプカー運転手
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology is already being deployed in controlled environments like mines and large-scale dam sites, navigating unpredictable public roads and complex construction sites remains a significant barrier. Japan's severe labor shortage in the transport sector will accelerate the adoption of AI-assisted safety and routing tools, but the physical requirement of operating heavy machinery and ensuring site safety keeps the core role human-centric for now.

title: トラックドライバー
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While AI and autonomous driving technology are advancing, the core job involves complex physical tasks like loading/unloading (荷役), navigating unpredictable urban environments, and final-mile delivery that remain difficult to automate fully. In Japan, AI is currently used to optimize routing and scheduling to address labor shortages, but human presence is still required for safety, legal compliance, and physical handling of goods.

title: トレーラートラックドライバー
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology is advancing, trailer driving involves complex maneuvering in unpredictable physical environments and specialized cargo handling that remains difficult to automate fully. In Japan, AI currently serves as a support tool for route optimization and safety monitoring, but regulatory hurdles and the physical nature of loading/unloading keep the core human requirement high.

title: ドローンパイロット
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core task of manual piloting is rapidly being replaced by AI-driven autonomous flight, obstacle avoidance, and pre-programmed pathing. While physical deployment and regulatory oversight remain, the 'pilot' role is shifting toward data management and mission supervision, with AI increasingly handling the complex real-time navigation and data analysis.

title: パイロット
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: Commercial aviation is already highly automated, but AI will further enhance flight path optimization, fuel efficiency, and real-time monitoring of complex systems. While technical barriers to fully autonomous flight are decreasing, Japan's strict safety regulations and the high-stakes responsibility for human lives ensure that human pilots remain necessary for oversight and emergency management for the foreseeable future.

title: ビル施設管理
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While monitoring and reporting tasks are increasingly automated via IoT and AI-driven building management systems, the core role requires physical presence for manual repairs, equipment inspections, and responding to unpredictable on-site tenant complaints. Japan's aging infrastructure ensures a continued need for human technicians to perform hands-on maintenance that robots cannot yet replicate in complex, existing environments.

title: フォークリフト運転作業員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While automated guided vehicles (AGVs) and autonomous forklifts are increasingly common in modern Japanese warehouses, a significant portion of the work involves non-routine handling of diverse cargo shapes and navigating unpredictable physical environments. Japan's labor shortage is accelerating the adoption of automated systems, but human operators remain essential for complex spatial tasks and 'last-inch' precision that current AI-driven hardware cannot yet fully replicate at scale.

title: フードデリバリー（料理配達員）
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業

title: ボイラーオペレーター
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of monitoring gauges, adjusting combustion, and recording data are highly susceptible to AI-driven predictive maintenance and automated control systems. However, the role still requires physical inspections, manual emergency shutdowns, and on-site equipment repairs, which provide a buffer against full automation.

title: ルート配送ドライバー
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving and route optimization AI will significantly impact the driving portion of the job, the core role involves heavy physical labor, such as loading/unloading containers and navigating unpredictable physical environments at delivery sites. Japan's severe labor shortage in logistics accelerates AI adoption for scheduling and navigation, but the manual handling of goods and interpersonal communication with store staff remain difficult to automate fully in the near term.

title: 介護タクシー運転手
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core of this job involves physical assistance (lifting, transferring patients) and driving in unpredictable urban environments, which are highly resistant to AI. While AI may optimize scheduling and route planning, the legal requirement for human caregiving qualifications and the physical nature of assisting elderly or disabled passengers ensure high human necessity.

title: 宅配便配達員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core of the job is physical labor—loading, driving, and navigating unpredictable environments to deliver packages to doorsteps—which remains difficult to automate fully. However, AI significantly impacts peripheral tasks like route optimization, load planning, and customer communication, while Japan's labor shortage is accelerating the use of AI-driven delivery lockers and autonomous delivery robots in specific zones.

title: 建設機械オペレーター
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While the core work is physical and takes place in unpredictable outdoor environments, this field is a primary target for 'i-Construction' initiatives in Japan. AI-driven automated driving, remote-controlled machinery, and GPS-guided precision leveling are already being deployed to combat labor shortages, transitioning the role from manual operation toward high-level supervision and system monitoring.

title: 新聞配達員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core task is physical delivery in unpredictable outdoor environments, which is highly resistant to AI automation. While AI and digitization are indirectly reducing the demand for physical newspapers, the actual labor of navigating complex Japanese residential routes and manual delivery remains a human-centric task with low technical exposure.

title: 清涼飲料ルートセールス
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core of this job involves heavy physical labor, manual driving, and the physical maintenance of vending machines, which are resistant to digital AI automation. While AI will significantly optimize route planning, inventory forecasting, and sales analysis, the physical requirement to load, transport, and stock heavy beverages remains a human-centric task in the near term.

title: 産業廃棄物収集運搬作業員
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: This occupation is primarily physical, requiring manual sorting, heavy lifting, and the operation of specialized machinery in unpredictable environments like construction sites and hospitals. While AI and autonomous driving may eventually assist with logistics and long-haul transport, the core tasks of navigating complex physical sites and handling hazardous materials manually remain difficult to automate in the near term.

title: 発電所運転管理
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The 'operation' aspect is highly digital and data-driven, involving monitoring and output adjustment that AI can optimize for efficiency and grid stability. However, the 'maintenance' aspect requires physical inspections, manual repairs, and emergency response in complex physical environments, which limits full automation in the near term.

title: 航海士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: The core tasks of navigation, route planning, and collision avoidance are increasingly being automated through AI-driven autonomous shipping technologies and advanced sensor fusion. While physical presence is still required for emergency response, maintenance, and leadership of multinational crews, Japan's severe maritime labor shortage is aggressively driving the adoption of AI to reduce the number of officers required per vessel.

title: 船舶機関士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While AI and automation are increasingly used for remote monitoring and predictive maintenance of ship engines, the role requires significant physical labor, manual repairs, and emergency response in a harsh, unpredictable maritime environment. Japan's focus on autonomous shipping may reduce crew sizes, but the need for human engineers to perform physical troubleshooting and oversee complex mechanical systems remains essential.

title: 観光バスガイド
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While AI and multilingual audio guides can automate the informational storytelling and translation aspects, the role remains physically demanding and requires real-time human interaction, safety management, and vehicle guidance. In Japan's hospitality culture (omotenashi), the emotional labor of entertaining guests and managing group dynamics provides a significant buffer against full automation.

title: 観光バス運転士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology (Level 4/5) is being tested, the physical complexity of navigating unpredictable tourist locations and the high safety responsibility for human lives create significant barriers. AI currently assists with peripheral tasks like route optimization and digital tachograph management, but the core job remains a physical, real-time operation requiring human presence and interpersonal service.

title: 路線バス運転士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology (Level 4) is being actively trialed in Japan to combat driver shortages, full replacement on complex city routes remains difficult due to unpredictable traffic and the need for physical passenger assistance. AI currently assists with scheduling, fuel optimization, and safety monitoring, but the core role still requires a human presence for safety accountability and helping elderly passengers.

title: 送迎バス等運転手
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: While autonomous driving technology (Level 4) is being trialed for fixed-route shuttles in Japan, the core job involves physical operation and real-time human assistance, especially for elderly or disabled passengers. Japan's regulatory environment and the need for physical safety checks and interpersonal care create a significant barrier to full AI replacement in the near term.

title: 鉄道車掌
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: Many core tasks like ticket checking, announcements, and door operations are being automated through digital systems and AI-driven monitoring. While safety oversight and emergency response still require a human presence, Japan's labor shortage is aggressively driving the expansion of 'One-Man' (driver-only) operations and autonomous train testing, significantly reducing the long-term demand for traditional conductors.

title: 電車運転士
category_ja: 輸送・機械運転の職業
exposure_rationale: Train operation is highly susceptible to AI because it follows fixed routes and is already supported by automated systems like ATC and ATO. While Japan's complex urban networks and safety protocols currently require human oversight for emergencies and passenger safety, the government and major rail operators (like JR East) are actively transitioning toward GoA3/GoA4 (driverless) technology to combat labor shortages.
